cleanup_policy.when: At the end of each orchestrated audit task, after final report synthesis and after reusable assets are promoted by security-skill-optimizer. Only task subdirectories under tmp/ are cleaned; reports/ and tmp/.gitkeep/tmp/README.md are preserved.

agent_session_id.source: Use the session id provided by the orchestrator. If none is provided, derive a stable id from agent name plus timestamp and report it in the output.

static_analysis.notes: Normalize static-analysis output to SARIF even when the underlying tool produces another format.

vulnerability_mining.cardinality: one file per vulnerability-mining agent session
vulnerability_mining.notes: Use this JSON for source-audit or vulnerability-mining findings before validation.

work.promotion_rule: Reusable scripts, Joern rules, static rules, vulnerability cases, and false-positive cases must be promoted by security-skill-optimizer before cleanup. When used, place temporary artifacts under tmp/<task_module>/.
